description: Create a new Repository Layout in JFrog Artifactory named 'flat-org-layout' using the admin account (password: 'password'). Configure the layout with the Artifact Path Pattern '[org]/[module]/[baseRev]/[module]-[baseRev](-[classifier]).[ext]', Descriptor Path Pattern '[org]/[module]/[baseRev]/[module]-[baseRev].pom', and both Folder and File Integration Revision RegExps set to 'SNAPSHOT'.
